_comment: Three runs: (1) feature 002 ends (dev, failed); (2) re-run without --retry-failed leaves it alone; (3) --retry-failed resets 002 to (ba, queued); 002's BA replays from 002-ba-1.json and Dev from 002-dev-2.json, reaching (done, complete).

after_run_2_no_flag._note: Feature 002 was NOT retried because --retry-failed was not passed.
